interactions.summary: Dugin says millions of Americans can reject Antichrist, defend human society and spiritual roots, and escape being reduced to the Antichristian West.
The host challenges Dugin on Russian/Epstein connections and asks Jiang for his view of Dugin's claim that the West relates to Antichrist.

Dugin concedes some Russian elites and oligarchs were touched by the Epstein network during Russia's 1990s convergence with the West, but says Russia's involvement was small and modern FSB manipulation of the West is Cold War mythology.
Jiang agrees overall that Western civilization contains anti-human ideas such as individuality, rationality, science, consumerism, and utilitarianism, but begins to frame a difference with Dugin.

speaker_notes.note: Diarization labels are not reliable in this multi-speaker interview; speaker attribution is inferred from conversational role and named address.

claims.claim: Dugin says American people are not identical with the Antichristian West; many can choose humanity, spiritual identity, and deep roots.
claims.temporal_scope: Claim made in this April 13, 2026 interview.

claims.claim: Dugin says some Russian oligarchs and elites had Epstein-network connections during Russia's 1990s attempt to converge with the West.
claims.temporal_scope: Claim made in this April 13, 2026 interview.

claims.claim: Dugin claims Russian involvement in the Epstein network was relatively small and rejects the idea that the modern FSB could manipulate the whole West.
claims.temporal_scope: Claim made in this April 13, 2026 interview.

claims.claim: Dugin says post-Soviet Russia is at a third stage of revival, after being paralyzed and seduced by the West and now returning to deep roots.
claims.temporal_scope: Claim made in this April 13, 2026 interview.

claims.claim: Jiang agrees that Western civilization is built on anti-human ideas including individuality, rationality, science, consumerism, and utilitarianism.
claims.temporal_scope: Claim made in this April 13, 2026 interview.

signature_moments.moment: Dugin gives America a free choice: be Antichristian West, or be real humans again.
signature_moments.source_phrase: you can be just antichristian West, or you can be humanity
signature_moments.why_it_matters: It keeps the interview from ending in civilizational determinism.

signature_moments.moment: Jiang accepts the anti-human diagnosis but prepares a materialist objection: the system is attractive.
signature_moments.source_phrase: Western civilization is based on certain ideas that are anti-human
signature_moments.why_it_matters: This sets up Jiang's strongest disagreement in the next packet.

glossary_terms.definition_or_usage: Jiang's shorthand for Western individuality, rationality, science, consumerism, and utilitarianism when they diverge from spiritual life.

uncertainty_notes.note: Segment 0102 is blank after repair; do not cite it for substantive claims.
